# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
  resources:
    - name: myResourceGroup
      type: Microsoft.Resources/resourceGroups
      apiVersion: 2019-10-01
      properties:
        location: eastus
        tags:
          environment: azure

    - name: myVM
      type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
      apiVersion: 2019-07-01
      dependsOn:
        - myResourceGroup
      properties:
        location: eastus
        OSProfile:
          computerName: myVMAnnouncement
          adminUsername: azureuser
          adminPassword: MySecurePassword!
          windowsConfiguration: null
        hardwareProfile:
          vmSize: Standard_DS2_v2
        storageProfile:
          imageReference:
            publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
            offer: WindowsServer
            sku: 2016-Datacenter
            version: latest
          osDisk:
            name: myOSDisk
            caching: ReadWrite
            createOption: FromImage
        networkProfile:
          networkInterfaceID: /subscriptions/<subscriptionId>/resourceGroups/myResourceGroup/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces/myNIC
        resources:
          - name: myDataDisk1
            type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/dataDisks
            apiVersion: 2019-07-01
            properties:
              createOption: Empty
              lun: 0
              diskSizeGB: 1023
              caching: ReadWrite
              managedDisk: null
